ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-17-2012 IN 503, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE. GRANTED PER CCP 36(A) AND 36(D). TRIAL IS NOV-13-2012 AT 11:15AM IN DEPT. 503. LAST DAY FOR HEARING SUMMARY MOTIONS IS NOV-1-2012. PLAINTIFF STIPULATES THAT SUMMARY MOTIONS MAY BE HEARD ON 15 DAYS NOTICE WITHOUT AN ADDITIONAL 2 DAYS FOR E-SERVICE. OPPOSITIONS DUE 5 COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING AND REPLIES DUE 2 COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. PLAINTIFF MUST BE PRODUCED FOR DEPOSITION WITHIN 20 DAYS OF THIS HEARING FOR DEFENDANT BIRD INC. AND ANY OTHER DEFENDANT WHO WAS SERVED IN THIS ACTION AFTER PLAINTIFF'S PRIOR DEPOSITION CONCLUDED. PLAINTIFF TO MAKE A SETTLEMENT DEMAND ON ALL DEFENDANTS NO LATER THAN OCT-15-2012. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN ROOM 603 AT 1:30PM ON NOV-1-2012. FACT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS OCT-26-2012. EXPERT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS NOV-9-2012. NO LATER THAN AUG-10-2012, PLAINTIFF MUST PROVIDE A STATEMENT STATING, AS TO EACH DEFENDANT, THE NAME AND CONTACT INFORMATION OF EACH PERSON WITH KNOWLEDGE OF ANY FACTS SUPPORTING ANY OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS. NO LATER THAN AUG-10-2012, DEFENDANTS MUST PROVIDE A STATEMENT STATING THE NAME AND CONTACT INFORMATION OF EACH PERSON WITH KNOWLEDGE OF ANY FACTS SUPPORTING ANY OF DEFENDANT'S AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES. ANY PERSON NOT IDENTIFIED ON THE STATEMENTS WILL BE BARRED FROM TESTIFYING AT TRIAL OR PRESENTING A DECLARATION ON A SUMMARY MOTION ABSENT GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING ANY OTHER SCHEDULING OR OTHER ISSUE WHICH ANY OF THEM WANT TO HAVE INCLUDED IN THE PREFERENCE ORDER. FURTHER CMC ON OCT-24-2012 AT 1:30PM. NO NEED FOR ANY PARTY TO FILE ANY CMC STATEMENT. PARTIES MAY APPEAR AT THE CONFERENCE BY TELEPHONE. THERE WILL BE A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH THE COURT PURSUANT TO SF LOCAL RULES OF COURT RULE 5 AND THE DATE OF THIS CONFERENCE WILL BE PROVIDED TO THE PARTIES BY THE COURT AT A LATER DATE. THE PARTIES SHALL COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 5.0. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON, REPORTER: RHONDA HARRIS, CSR #7

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jennifer L. Alesio of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties Irene Williams, et al.

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS IRENE WILLIAMS, ET AL.'S MOTION TO APPOINT MARTHA LAMBERTS AS SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST TO, AND SUBSTITUTE SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST FOR IRENE WILLIAMS, DECEASED PLAINTIFF, AND FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's motion to appoint Martha Lamberts as successor-in-interest to, and substitute successor-in-interest for Irene Williams, deceased plaintiff, and for leave to file first amended complaint is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)
